description: Sprint 2026-04-04 (HOTFIX): Correct RPM dangerMin threshold per Spool's vehicle-specific review. Single-story sprint.

userStories.title: Correct RPM dangerMin to 7000 per Spool Vehicle-Specific Review (B-028 Rework)
userStories.description: As a driver of a 1998 Eclipse GST (97-99 2G with factory redline = 7000 RPM), I want the RPM danger threshold set at 7000 so that valve float risk triggers a danger alert at the correct vehicle-specific threshold. This is a correction to US-110 based on Spool's tuning review (2026-04-12). The earlier draft incorrectly used 7200 as the danger threshold; the corrected spec uses 7000 because the 97-99 2G has a softer cam and factory redline of 7000 RPM (unlike the 95-96 2G which used 7200).
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/obd_config.json: tieredThresholds.rpm.dangerMin changed from 7200 to 7000
Update tests/test_rpm_thresholds.py: module docstring to reflect 'Caution (>6500-7000), Danger (>7000)'
Update tests/test_rpm_thresholds.py: sample config fixture dangerMin=7000 (was 7200)
Remove or update any tests asserting 7100 or 7200 is caution (they should now be danger)
Update tests/test_rpm_thresholds.py docstring comments to reflect new boundaries
If any other tests (orchestrator, alerts, integration) assert RPM thresholds, update them to match
All existing tests in test_rpm_thresholds.py still pass
Full test suite (pytest tests/) still passes — no regression in other modules
Update offices/pm/backlog/B-028.md US-110 to mark as Complete once tests pass
Update offices/ralph/stories.json US-139 passes=true with summary note
Verify obd_config.json remains valid JSON (python -m json.tool or validate_config.py)
userStories.notes: Complete. dangerMin corrected from 7200 to 7000 in obd_config.json. Updated test_rpm_thresholds.py: fixtures, docstrings, section comments, boundary tests (7000=caution, 7001=danger), added 7200=danger test. Updated test_primary_screen.py threshold config. 28/28 RPM tests pass, 1517/1517 full suite passes. B-028 US-110 AC checked. Config JSON validated.
